COLT 2026
  • Twitter
  • YouTube

Conference on Learning Theory

The 39th Annual Conference on Learning Theory (COLT 2026) takes place June 29-July 3 in San Diego, California.

Hotel Reservation

The conference will take place at the Bahia Resort Hotel. The link will take you to a page with a preferred rate for COLT.

Important Dates

All dates are in 2026.

February 4 (AoE) Submission deadline
April 3 Reviews released
April 10 Initial author response due
April 10-April 20 Discussion period
May 4 Author notification
May 7 Workshop/Tutorial/Community event proposals
June 29-July 3 Conference

Conference Organization

Program Chairs

  • Steve Hanneke (Purdue University)
  • Tor Lattimore (Google DeepMind)

Local Chairs

  • Mikhail Belkin (University of California San Diego)
  • Yian Ma (University of California San Diego)

Open Problems Chairs

  • Shay Moran (Technion, Google)
  • Zachary Chase (Kent State University)

Publication Chair

  • Wojciech Kotłowski (Poznań University of Technology)

Workshops and Tutorials Chair

  • Lydia Zakynthinou (Johns Hopkins University)

Program committee

Sponsors

We are very grateful to our sponsors whose extraordinary generosity has been critical to the continued success of the conference, particularly by making it possible for students to attend and present their research. For information about sponsorship opportunities, please contact the sponsorship chairs at sponsorships@learningtheory.org.

Contact Information

  • Program Chairs: colt2026conference@gmail.com
  • Workshop/Tutorial Chairs: colt2026community@gmail.com
  • Sponsorships: sponsorships@learningtheory.org
